title: Updates deleted by API remain in item update count
excerpt: If an update is deleted with the “delete_update” or “clear_item_updates” mutation, the count of updates on the item in the UI is not correctly updated. See resulting image below for an example, where all updates have bee…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
If an update is deleted with the “delete_update” or “clear_item_updates” mutation, the count of updates on the item in the UI is not correctly updated. See resulting image below for an example, where all updates have been deleted yet the board table shows 10 updates on the item.

2022-08-30_10-57-131233×620 59.2 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @anon29275264!

That is strange.

I can not reproduce the error. It works fine with both mutation on my end.

Can you send a screen recording of the issue to appsupport@monday.com including timestamp, board ID and item ID?

Cheers,
Matias
